appTagline: A NestJS + Nuxt monorepo starter kit — authentication, RBAC, and a typed data layer ready to build on.

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your email and password to sign in!
auth.registerSubtitle: Get started in less than a minute.
auth.registrationDisabled: Self-service registration is currently disabled. Ask an administrator to create your account.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.
auth.resetLinkSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.
auth.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetInvalidLink: This reset link is invalid or incomplete.
auth.resetInvalidExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

error.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.
error.genericDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
